channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: From near-collapse to $689 billion: Inside Larry Culp's turnaround of GE
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: 'The demographic dividend of the last 40 years is ending': J.P. Morgan says the world is running out of the two things that kept interest rates down
item.description: "The demographic dividend that characterized the last 40 years is ending," the J.P. Morgan note reads.

item.title: European travel platform Omio raises $10 million and buys Rail Europe as it chases Asia's tourism market
item.description: Why Omio is betting on trains and buses--and not planes--to crack Asia's travel boom

item.title: AI does not end scarcity; it shifts it elsewhere
item.description: As executives focus on what AI makes abundant, value moves to scarcities they overlook and often no longer control.
